{
  "mnemonics": ["Calculate CRC", "Polynomial X^16 + X^12 + X^5 + 1"],
  "keyPoints": [
    " CRC-CCITT is a 16-bit error detecting algorithm",
    "Polynomial used in CRC-CCITT is X^16 + X^12 + X^5 + 1",
    "CRC-CCITT is used to detect single-bit errors in data",
    "It generates a 16-bit checksum value for a given dataset",
    "The checksum value is calculated using the polynomial"
  ]
